author: Jie Huang
description: Turn reading into active recall, critique prompts, and real-task practice—so you can use what you learn. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jie Huang
manifest.description: Local-first learning sessions for active recall, critique prompts, and real-task practice.
manifest.name: Learning Practice Coevolution

name: Learning Practice Coevolution

releases.author: michael-uplive021
releases.description:
Documentation-first release that makes the learning loop easier to understand and start.

- Rewrites the Chinese-first README and keeps the English version in sync.
- Clarifies the Mentor → Digital Apprentice → Observer workflow.
- Updates Agent Skill metadata, usage notes, and the Obsidian plugin landing copy.
- Keeps behavior, privacy, and local-first boundaries unchanged.
releases.name: Learning Practice Coevolution 0.1.3

releases.author: michael-uplive021
releases.description:
Documentation/listing refresh for the Obsidian Community page. Plugin behavior is unchanged.

Assets for Obsidian:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

This release keeps the local-first, no-network, no-telemetry boundary.
releases.name: Learning Practice Coevolution 0.1.2

releases.author: michael-uplive021
releases.description:
Obsidian community plugin candidate release.

This release renames the Obsidian plugin surface to Learning Practice Coevolution and aligns the plugin id with the public skill name.

Assets for Obsidian installation:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

The plugin is local-first: it creates local Markdown learning sessions and prompt templates, does not call AI APIs, does not collect telemetry, and does not make network requests.
releases.name: Learning Practice Coevolution 0.1.1
